summary: Completed all 20 steps + 1 prerequisite. Implemented OcctKernelHandle dedicated-thread actor pattern with mpsc/oneshot channels. Removed unsound unsafe Send+Sync from OcctKernel, converted trait impl to inherent methods. OcctKernelHandle implements GeometryKernel and is Send+Sync. All external call sites migrated. 14 new handle tests + all existing tests pass (180+ total, zero warnings).
